subject: You already have a profile on OpenMentor
html:
A profile with this email already exists — sign in instead
You already have a profile
Hi {{first_name}} — we received a new mentor application with this email address, but a mentor profile with this email already exists on OpenMentor.
If that profile is yours, there's no need to register again — sign in to your dashboard with a magic link, no password needed.
Open dashboard
Didn't submit this application? You can safely ignore this email.
Something looks off or you can't get in? Write to hello@openmentor.io.
openmentor.io · free mentorship for the tech community
text:
Hi {{first_name}},

We received a new mentor application with this email address, but a mentor profile with this email already exists on OpenMentor.

If that profile is yours, there's no need to register again — sign in to your dashboard with a magic link, no password needed:
https://openmentor.io/mentor/login

Didn't submit this application? You can safely ignore this email.
Something looks off or you can't get in? Write to hello@openmentor.io.

---
openmentor.io · free mentorship for the tech community
https://openmentor.io
